name: White Chocolate Raspberry Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl with an electric mixer, blend walnuts, 3/4 of the butter, sugar, flour, zest and egg until combined well. Press into an 11 inch tart pan with removable bottom. Freeze shell for 15 minutes.
2. While the shell is freezing, preheat oven to 375F.
3. Bake shell in middle of the oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool on a rack.
4. Remove side of pan and transfer shell to a plate. Fill shell with 2 1/2 cups of raspberries.
5. In a large metal bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water, melt the chocolate. Remove bowl from heat and whisk in the cream and the remaining butter, whisking until smooth. Spread chocolate mixture over the raspberries, smoothing top and chill, covered for 3 hours or overnight.
6. Garnish tart with whipped cream and remaining 1/2 cup of raspberries. Serve at room temperature.
